indicators.name: L-shaped desk
indicators.rationale: The L-shaped desk occupies a significant portion of the floor space, leaving little room for a yoga mat or other stretching equipment.

indicators.name: bookshelves
indicators.rationale: The bookshelves along the walls create a cluttered and visually distracting environment, which is not conducive to the calming atmosphere required for yoga.

indicators.name: filing cabinet
indicators.rationale: The filing cabinet further obstructs the available floor space and adds to the visual clutter, making it difficult to find a clear area for yoga.

indicators.name: stacks of papers and boxes
indicators.rationale: The floor is cluttered with stacks of papers and boxes, which obstructs the floor space and makes it impossible to set up a yoga mat or perform any stretching exercises.

indicators.name: no open floor area visible
indicators.rationale: There is no open floor area visible, which is essential for performing yoga and stretching exercises.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is highly unsuitable for yoga and stretching due to the presence of a large L-shaped desk, bookshelves, a filing cabinet, and cluttered floor space. There is no open floor area visible, making it impossible to perform any yoga or stretching exercises in this space.
